name: Djinn Rust
description: Rust toolchain (rustup) + rust-analyzer. Installs rust-analyzer two ways: as a rustup component on the configured toolchain (for interactive IDE use) AND as a standalone binary at $CARGO_HOME/bin/rust-analyzer (bypasses rustup's per-project toolchain resolution, so `rust-analyzer scip` works regardless of what the project's rust-toolchain.toml pins).

toolchain.description: Toolchain passed to `rustup toolchain install`. Accepts any string rustup understands: `stable`, `beta`, `nightly`, `1.86.0`, `nightly-2026-04-01`, etc.
